title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
summary: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

title: Simulate realistic users to evaluate multi-turn AI agents in Strands Evals
summary: In this post, we explore how ActorSimulator in Strands Evaluations SDK addresses the challenge with structured user simulation that integrates into your evaluation pipeline.

title: Scaling seismic foundation models on AWS: Distributed training with Amazon SageMaker HyperPod and expanding context windows
summary: This post describes how TGS achieved near-linear scaling for distributed training and expanded context windows for their Vision Transformer-based SFM using Amazon SageMaker HyperPod. This joint solution cut training time from 6 months to just 5 days while enabling analysis of seismic volumes larger than previously possible.

title: Control which domains your AI agents can access
summary: In this post, we show you how to configure AWS Network Firewall to restrict AgentCore resources to an allowlist of approved internet domains. This post focuses on domain-level filtering using SNI inspection — the first layer of a defense-in-depth approach.

title: Rocket Close transforms mortgage document processing with Amazon Bedrock and Amazon Textract
summary: Through a strategic partnership with the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center (GenAIIC), Rocket Close developed an intelligent document processing solution that has significantly reduced processing time, making the process 15 times faster. The solution, which uses Amazon Textract for OCR processing and Amazon Bedrock for foundation models (FMs), achieves a strong 90% overall accuracy in document segmentation, classification, and field extraction.

title: Persist session state with filesystem configuration and execute shell commands
summary: In this post, we go through how to use managed session storage to persist your agent's filesystem state and how to execute shell commands directly in your agent's environment.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: Ensemble Brings Agentic AI to RCM Platform with Cohere
summary: Learn how Ensemble is bringing agentic AI automations to its industry-leading platform with Cohere’s new custom LLM for healthcare RCM.

title: YC-Bench: Can Your AI Agent Run a Startup Without Going Bankrupt?
Wan 2.7 now available on Together AI
summary: A four-model video suite for generation, continuation, reference-driven workflows, and editing, rolling out on Together AI starting with text-to-video.

title: AI for Systems: Using LLMs to Optimize Database Query Execution
summary: New research shows LLMs can optimize database query execution plans—achieving up to 4.78x speedups by correcting the cardinality estimation errors that statistical heuristics miss.

title: Deepgram speech-to-text and voice models now available natively on Together AI
summary: Production STT and TTS from Deepgram, available on Together AI Dedicated Model Inference for real-time voice agents.

title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a one-minute way to equip any computer with its AI agent capabilities. It is presented as a native product on the company homepage.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announcement
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company describes it as part of its new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The homepage also states it performs strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance at the 100B-class level. It is described as supporting tool use natively and handling up to 128K context.

title: AutoGLM agent model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: GLM-PC and CogAgent-9B open source
summary: On November 29, 2024, Zhipu AI proposed the GLM-OS concept and released the AutoGLM and GLM-PC agent products; it later open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC. CogAgent-9B-20241220 is described as a specialized agent-task model trained from GLM-4V-9B using screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay update: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI shared new agent progress including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step autonomous operations, cross-app task execution, and a fully automated web-browsing experience. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing for computer-use scenarios.

title: Intel partnership for AI PC products
summary: Zhipu AI announced a deeper ecosystem partnership with Intel, delivering on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX intelligent programming assistant for AI PCs. The collaboration was presented at Intel's AI PC ecosystem event as part of joint innovation in end-cloud integrated AI applications.

ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment news item for students interested in foundation model work.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The announcement indicates a new preview model availability for evaluation or testing.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a major model release in the company's product lineup.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release focused on improved generation quality.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This is a new model/product release in the Seedance series.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, described as delivering advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes improved reasoning capabilities for math-focused tasks.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model launch with broad agentic capabilities.

title: Official Release of Seedance 1.5 pro
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 pro, promoted with the tagline 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The launch suggests a multimodal model or product update combining audio and visual capabilities.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations with evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free Baichuan-M3-Plus API access to organizations serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-grounded medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Turbo, a model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. It is described as offering 10%+ better usability than Baichuan4, lower deployment and inference costs, and significantly faster first-token and token streaming speeds.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI newly released Baichuan4-Air, an MoE model featuring the company's PRI architecture and enterprise-focused optimization. The company highlights very low inference cost, fast speed, and leading performance among industry models.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced as a commercially usable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning and low hallucination performance. It is presented as a 235B-parameter model with leading open HealthBench results and full consultation capability.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The 32B-parameter model is positioned as a strong open model on HealthBench with 32K context length.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The 14B-parameter model is described as trained with 20T of medical-enhanced data and supports 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B released as an open commercial multilingual model
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan2-13B, an open-source, commercially usable multilingual model. The company says it improves substantially over the previous 13B generation in math, coding, safety, reasoning, and semantic understanding.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent it says marks the start of an era focused on delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise agent offering rather than a research demo.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives top-level CAICT certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification highlights external validation of the company's enterprise AI infrastructure product.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as an open-source Mixture-of-Experts large language model and described it as achieving global state-of-the-art performance. This is a named model announcement tied to the company's Yi foundation model lineup.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI highlighted a meeting between Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev and CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The item signals a notable government-level engagement relevant to the company's international profile and business development.

2025-07-31 StepMesh: A Communication Library for Attention-FFN Disaggregation This article delves into the technical details and design choices of StepMesh, sharing our insights and considerations regarding the communication requirements for AF Separation systems.
2025-07-24 Step-Audio 2: Breakthrough in End-to-End Speech Modeling Technology Step-Audio 2 is an end-to-end multimodal large language model engineered for industrial applications

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
